title: Sex Is Zero 2
tmdbOverview: In his 10th year at college, Eun-sik is part of a nearly ideal campus couple with swimming champ Kyung-ah. While their three-year relationship is solid, Eun-sik struggles to get to the next level with Kyung-ah; despite the help and support of his friends, he can't manage to get her into bed.
synopsis: Sex Is Zero 2 (2007) is a romance, comedy and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a NC-17 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
